content.title: Commercial Concrete
content.tagline: Built for Strength, Function, and Precision
content.subtitle: Built for Strength, Function, and Precision

content.title:
Building Central Ohio,
One Project at a Time
content.paragraph1: At Maxima Concrete, we understand the unique demands of commercial construction — tight schedules, strict regulations, and the need for absolute reliability. Serving Columbus, Delaware, and surrounding Central Ohio counties, our team delivers durable, code-compliant, and visually precise concrete work for a wide range of industries.
content.paragraph2: From restaurants and schools to gas stations and office parks, we bring experience, craftsmanship, and commitment to every pour.

content.title: Comprehensive Commercial Concrete Services

items.text: Concrete outlasts wood and composite materials, resisting rot, insects, and weather damage. With proper care, your porch can look beautiful for decades.

benefits.title: Footers
benefits.description: A solid beginning for every structure. Our reinforced concrete footers distribute weight evenly, ensuring long-term stability and strength.

items.text: No sanding, staining, or frequent repairs — just simple cleaning and occasional resealing to keep it pristine.

benefits.title: Slab on Grade
benefits.description: Perfectly level and engineered for durability, our slabs create the ideal foundation for commercial floors, warehouses, and industrial buildings.

items.text: From modern lines to rustic charm, we offer custom forms, colors, and stamps to match your home’s architecture and style.

benefits.title: Curbs & Sidewalks
benefits.description: Designed for safety, accessibility, and longevity, our curbs and sidewalks meet all ADA and local municipality standards.

items.text: A high-quality porch immediately elevates your home’s exterior, adding sophistication and boosting resale value.

benefits.title: Light Pole Bases
benefits.description: Precision-engineered bases for lighting fixtures, providing safety, electrical reliability, and structural support.

content.description: Maxima Concrete provides a full suite of commercial concrete installations, ensuring seamless coordination across your entire project.

items.title: Restaurants
items.description: Durable patios and outdoor dining areas

items.title: Banks & Pharmacies
items.description: Safe, accessible concrete entrances and drive-thrus.

items.title: Warehouses & Gas Stations
items.description: Heavy-duty slabs for equipment and traffic.

content.title: Industries We Serve
content.closing1: Every project is executed with engineering-level precision, safety compliance, and meticulous finish work.
content.subtitle: Maxima Concrete’s portfolio spans hundreds of successful projects across Central Ohio’s commercial sector.

We don't just pour concrete — we build trust, one project at a time.

items.answer: We typically use a 6.5-bag (4500 PSI) fiber-reinforced mix with 10-gauge wire mesh for strength, crack control, and long-term durability.
items.question: What type of concrete does Maxima use for commercial projects?

items.answer: Yes. We manage new construction, additions, and ADA-compliant remodels, ensuring consistency across all phases.
items.question: Do you handle both new builds and renovations?

items.answer: Absolutely. Our crews are trained to read and execute from blueprints, collaborating seamlessly with general contractors and engineers.
items.question: Can you build to architectural or engineered plans?

items.answer: We serve Columbus, Delaware, Franklin, Union, Licking, and Fairfield Counties — and select neighboring regions across Central Ohio.
items.question: What areas do you serve?
